reviews.review_description: i have had this game for about 4 years of having this vr and i just completed it today and it is absolutely amazing. i just want to see good job on the animation and to all the people who helped create this game.

So far this is my second favorite game I love how interactive it is I love the setting and the story is “absolute cinema” a I expect you to die movie would be amazing another thing is the introduction the intro told so much of the story without telling it at all it was like a teaser ok next game the spy and the liar
I have every single souvenir and beat the game and even now I still have a good time playing it and I’m planning game the second one soon.

As an extreme schell games fan, the I Expect You To Die trilogy is PERFECT. I have no notes. Having played all the games, the story, character development, level design, voice acting, and everything else is amazing. A lot of bad reviews for this game are complaints about how it’s entirely based on trial and error, and that is correct; it’s one of the things I love about the game! I HIGHLY recommend it for anybody who enjoys spy/escape room games. Again, it’s flawless; please get this game. The fanbase is too small and I’m lonely.

developer_response.body: We're so glad to hear that you're enjoying the trilogy! If you're looking to connect with more I Expect You To Die fans, please check out our Discord community at https://discord.gg/schellgames.

reviews.review_description: The I Expect You To Die series is the best puzzle game series by far, the attention to detail is incredible and so is the storyline!!!😃

reviews.review_title: The game that started it all
reviews.review_description: I've played all 3 games and I'm just now writting a review for each one this game is what started it all the story off the start is easy to understand but very good the intro sequence is unlike anything I've seen before I mean just so peak the gameplay itself is so good it's a seated experience which I like and the fact that your only in one place and you gotta use what's around you to get trough really makes you think the puzzles aren't easy but they also aren't impossible just right in the middle yes theres tiny flaws here and there but it's the first game and the tiny flaws it has are forgiven by just the great game it is if your thinking about buying I highly recommend you do one of my favs games I've ever played on VR
I just discovered and bought the first two but……. I don’t know about the third it looks……….different.
Ist fun but very short like i got to the last mission in like 90 min

My review scale*
5- Amazing game, while still might not be perfect any flaws are forgivable, is well worth your time
4- Good game, might have a few minor issues or missed opportunities keeping it from being better, but is very playable and still an enjoyable experience
3- Mid tier game, not great but not awful, these games can go either way depending on who you are or what you want or expect out of the game
2- Not a very good game, but not completely broken or unplayable, you might really need to want to play this game to get any enjoyment out of it
1- Awful game, broken or unplayable, I don't see these games being for anyone unless significant updates fix the game

*This is an overly simplified review scale since meta does not allow for half stars so in some cases I may round a game up or down depending on a case by case scenario, 
my reviews are always honest and in no way swayed by anybody else and regardless if I received a game for free or not, these ratings and reviews are however part of a 
campaign for us as consumers to be better about reviewing games and helping bring the games we love the attention they deserve.
The game that made vr great 👍

The Ieytd trilogy is the best. I have played all 3 and have 100% completion on the 3rd one. (I played them awhile ago but im only now writing a review).  I would recommend them to anyone. Also the 1 star reviews are ridiculous just because you cant figure it out dose not mean it's bad, ik I got stuck on some levels but I just used youtube if I was that stuck. Anyway amazing games and amazing value for money. (cant wait for the 4th one). 😊

Fun and replay-able!!

This the best game i have ever played also i got so mad i didn't play for an year so i don't think i could play the other 2 but game 10/10 graphics the best puzzles kinda hard especially death engine but besides all that i love this game and i pray the best for you guys.

reviews.review_description: so when are we gonna see the electric eel and the tiger shock with the lightso on its head we doing i expect you to die 4
A must have…perfect balance of story, comedy, puzzle, and adventure. If you don’t have this title, you are missing out. Worth every penny and then some…
THIS MIGHT BE ONE OF THE GREATEST STORY JAMES BOND TYPE GAME PLUS THE SONGS ARE AN ABSOLUTE CINEMA
I’ve got all 3 and even now they stand tall as some of the best games I’ve purchased. Can get repetitive however if your trying to 100% it.

Everything about it is amazing, the story telling, the mechanics, and even the secrets. With all of the escape rooms being connected to a big plot, which expands further onto the other games, this game is amazing.

This is a really fun puzzle game.
I just can't stop playing it

The opening credits is the best opening credits of any game. Second of all, its EXACTLY like a James Bond game. The end is pretty sad. Because you and the handler die but SOMEHOW YOUR STILL ALIVE AND THE HANDLER IS. Which means you can still play (because why not?) and you get souvenirs which are basically achievements. AND best of all *drumroll*. DRINK ALCOHOL AND SMOKE A CIGARETTE. I do really like the use of tobacco in games and you and put on some nice hats, like a bowl a fedora and maybe some else too? Its also basically a dumb ways to die game. Because you can die in anyway its a bit hard, but VERY FUNNY!

This game has the perfect humour, style and gameplay to my taste. When I bought a psvr, I bought this game because it looked interesting, the reviews were good and it wasn’t expensive. I had no idea how good this game was going to be! It’s my favourite game series, and all my nephews, nieces and my brother who use my vr at times, all of them really like this game too. I even bought it again for my quest!
There’s one important thing to remember with this game: Don’t give up. If you get stuck, take a break and play something else, once you get back to it you’ll usually solve it. Try everything again even if you think you already tried something, try it again. It’s a great feeling when you solve the puzzles on your own without going online to look for hints (sometimes you might feel tempted to do that 🤣).
Like in live generally you learn by making mistakes, the same goes for this game, indeed, I expect you to die is the perfect name for this game.
Fun for the first 10 minutes… until you realize you’ll be repeating those same 10 minutes forever.

reviews.review_title: One of my all time favorite games
reviews.review_description: Beautiful, fun game plan, and difficult puzzles (take that one with a grain of salt, I'm very dumb).  For me this game is only topped bt the later installments in the series.

Being bored, I found this game by chance with a demo and I'm so glad I did! I bought the game immediately! The design, the puzzles, mechanics and story of the game are just incredible! This is my favourite game hands down!

If i could rate it 100 stars, i would! I expect you to die is an action packed espionage adventure against Zoraxis, led by Dr. Zor. You play as a genetically enhanced agent for the E.O.D (Enhanced Opratives Devision) with a telekinetic implant, trust me, it helps alot.
Amazing game - lots of puzzles, great story and fun too
these games are like no other, a very immersive & exciting experience. very grateful to have been agent phoenix! highly recommend the bundle, you won’t regret it!

This games is one of my favorites because of the crystal hunt the crystal hunt is one of my favorite game modes but my favorite is sandbox mode with the built in mods the mods make the game so fun you could literally be Thor

I Expect you to die, 100% Review!

This game is phenomenal the story and the voice acting are amazing the visuals for it being a 2016-2021 game are mind blowing , as a puzzle game it does everything correctly showing not telling , the achievements are fun and the jokes are witty and land every time!

Some souvenirs are a little buggy but that can be overlooked regardless I highly recommend this game , easy and fun to understand and youll have a blast!
PEak vr game
This game is literally the perfect start to an amazing series. You MUST buy this game as well as the others in the franchise. Greatest classic vr game of all time.
So good i just finished the ENTIRE game (souvenirs included) yep that's right! :)

reviews.review_title: I Love A Good Puzzle Game. This is one!
reviews.review_description:
I love a good puzzle game, having been a fan of the 7th Guest when it originally came out as a PC game, decades before VR! I’ve enjoyed playing the entire series of The Room, and finished their newest title, Ghost Town in one long session!

IEYTD offers something different tho - many of the puzzles have very short timescales before an unprepared person will get killed. You have to think fast and act fast, or you’ll get blown up, suffocated, drowned, or any other manner of frustrating death. I’ve found myself playing some levels more than 20 times before I’ve completed them. It can be frustrating, but it’s also great fun and a proper brainworkout f
 
There are three games in the series, I bought them all in a bundle in a sale. I’m not playing 2 or 3 before complete 1, so I’m working hard to complete this game, cod I hate looking at games on my library I don’t play. I’m looking forward to them both tho, because this one is great

This game is absolutely amazing, I got it while it was on sale at the start of this summer and it has been one of my favourite vr games I’ve ever played, top 3 definitely. If you are looking for a 007 James Bond/spy experience this game has you covered. The voice acting, level design, comedy and overall style is amazing with hidden gems to find with this games souvenir and dev mode which I especially enjoyed. If you are looking for a great vr experience I would definitely recommend this game.
Another awesome game!
Buy it

reviews.review_title: This game is the reason I play vr
reviews.review_description: I had heard of this game because I love puzzles so I got it and I can't stop playing it

I expect you to die, is something that I thought was going to be a boring game until I downloaded it, the game is phenomenal. The level design is great, you can tell they took their time in it. The voice acting is some of the best in a VR game that I have seen in a while, and I play a lot of VR games. I have played all of the three I expect you to die, and am ready for a 4th. I loved all the games, and have almost 100% it all, just missing some souvenirs, but overall my favorite VR game series ever. The second one is my favorite but I loved them all, thank you to the developers for making such a great game!

I typically love escape room games, I love puzzle games and I enjoy spy games, but this game often rips the fun from its puzzles by adding an overused 'die and retry' mechanic and timed memory puzzles. Don't get me wrong, there is a lot to like about this game.  The theme, storytelling and voice acting are top notch.  But so much of this is based on dying over and over to learn the proper sequence and having things ready before the triggered event occurs.  Dying over and over is a cheap method that developers often use to give the illusion of content.  Why make more content when you can just have the player re-hash over the same stuff?  Plus this game WILL give you a sore neck from having to twist your head WAY over to see behind you.  You cannot pivot or move your character and must rely on getting off your seat to twist around.  This game could of been so much more...

I didn’t try ￼ game yet ￼
Because you have the headset online to download, but I  give it five star because it’s very good !￼

Wow! I was satisfied with what I paid just with the opening credits. Amazing. But the game is insanely fun and addictive. I had some friends over and let them try and I’m pretty sure they’ll be getting a quest nuts to play this game. A million stars!

I want to replay this game from the very beginning. I uninstalled the game and reinstalled. But I still has all my data. Is there a way to restart a brand new game? I went to tech support but it would not allow me to submit my request. It says my device verion is incorrect. I’m playing on a quest 2. Please help.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you are running into issues in removing your save data. Please reach out to Player Support at https://bit.ly/4buuWAU so we can work through what might be going wrong.

reviews.review_description: The best

Excellent game to buy on discount. I don’t recommend purchasing it at full price. I give it 5 stars because, even though it’s a short game, it meets the expectations it set out to achieve. The game recommends playing seated, but I played standing and felt the same level of immersion. The puzzles are accessible, and certainly many users won’t have trouble finishing it without looking up solutions online. I repeat, it’s very worth buying on discount.
Loved it so far, tricky missions but all passable with a lot of trial and error, I only have to look up a walk-threw once!
This is one of my go to games and makes me feel like a spy. I love the interactions and how you can use chemistry to solve puzzles. One of the best games and a must buy
I loved the game highly recommend
A puzzle game wrapped as a spy thriller. Great for beginners with no motion sickness and can be played seated. I liked this one a lot. Great intro scene.

I cannot believe I waiting this long getting g this game! 

The game is at the core, a point and click game but with interactive vr escape room feel. Each scene puzzle become increasingly difficult but not that difficult if you step back and just think a little.  

There’s little side puzzles/achievements that make it fun going through the scenes repeatedly. 

I cannot wait to see the sequels when I finish this! 

Resist YouTube looking how to solve it! Trust me!

This game is very fun. I've played it as of today, 20+ times I recommend it 10/10 game. My favorite is definitely I expect you to die 2. This is one of the few games I feel like everyone should play, even if it's just the first
